headers:
Push the needle straight onto the pen. Turn until it is on tight.
(See figure D).

rows.Push the needle straight onto the pen. T:
The needle is covered by two caps. You must remove both caps.
If you forget to remove both caps you will not inject any Wegovy.
Pull off the outer needle cap and keep it for later. You will need it
to safely remove the needle from the pen after the injection.
Pull off the inner needle cap and dispose of it. A drop of Wegovy
may appear at the needle tip. You must still check the Wegovy flow
if you use a new pen for the first time. See ‘Check the flow with
each new pen’.
Never use a bent or damaged needle. For more information about
needle handling, see ‘About your needles’ below these instructions.
(See figure E).
